markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session between StackBlitz and GrowthX to align on competitor comparison pages and template/starter kit strategies for Bolt.](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating high-quality comparison pages for direct competitors (e.g., Lovable) and complementary tools (e.g., Cursor, Winsurf)](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Develop a curated list of \~100 premium-quality templates/starter kits, emphasizing customizability and one-shot prompts](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Leverage community-created content to generate dynamic, SEO-friendly pages with auto-generated tutorials](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Localization efforts to prioritize French, with potential expansion to other key markets](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Competitor Landscape Analysis

  - [Expanded competitor list to include emerging players like Tempo Labs (tempo.new) and Spawn.co](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Differentiation strategy: Emphasize Bolt's strengths in design, easy integrations (e.g., streamlined Stripe), and deploy simplicity](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Persona-targeted comparisons: Developer-focused for Winsurf/Cursor, core ICP for Lovable/direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

### Template and Starter Kit Strategy

  - [Create \~100 highly curated, premium-quality templates (e.g., portfolio sites, landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implement detailed, customizable one-shot prompts (600+ lines) for non-technical users](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Design template pages with embedded previews, long-form prompts, and easy customization options](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Categorize templates (e.g., portfolio, e-commerce) with SEO-optimized category descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### Community Content Utilization

  - [Explore featuring community-created content alongside curated templates](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Generate auto-created tutorials from community projects, explaining frameworks and techniques used](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Implement user opt-in for template sharing to expand content library](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Treat templates as products in an e-commerce catalog approach](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Target long-tail searches with individual templates](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Create category pages for broader keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Develop feature-specific content (e.g., "how to build a contact form in Bolt")](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)

### Localization and International Markets

  - [Primary focus on English-speaking audience](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [French identified as second-largest paying customer base](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Consider localization for French and German markets, where users tend to search in their native language](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Technical Implementation

  - [Bolt frontend: JavaScript (possibly Remix)](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [Backend: Rails (carried over from StackBlitz infrastructure)](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [In-house team handling homepage redesign; potential for GrowthX assistance with development](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitchell to share existing persona/user research data with the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Connect George (GrowthX) with KJ (StackBlitz) to align on user research direction](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Dave to provide guidance on Strapi CMS setup for category structure and URLs](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [GrowthX team to develop detailed plans for comparison page content models and template categories](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Mitchell to share additional language/geographic data on paying customers and account users](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Begin work on curated template list and comparison page content](https://fathom.video/share/zExnxnHbxx2Uu2s4_jejhQZ2jcw9CeBP?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
